items.title: Assessing Microsoft (MSFT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Views
items.description: Microsoft (MSFT) is back in focus for investors after recent trading, with the share price around $472.85 and short term returns across the week, month, and past 3 months all showing declines. See our latest analysis for Microsoft. That recent weak share price momentum, with the 90 day share price return down 9.91% and year to date share price return roughly flat, contrasts with a 12.78% 1 year total shareholder return and stronger multi year gains. This may hint at investors reassessing near...

items.title: Is Microsoft’s Expanding AI Role in Healthcare and Power Grids Reshaping Its Cloud Narrative for MSFT?
items.description: RSM US LLP has previously rolled out an AI-powered adverse event reporting platform in Hawai‘i, built on Microsoft Azure, Azure SQL, Azure AI Foundry, Power BI and other Microsoft Data & AI tools to monitor healthcare risks in near real time across roughly 3,600 participants. This deployment, alongside Azure’s use in power-grid digital twins and large-scale grid operations, underscores how Microsoft’s AI cloud is increasingly embedded in critical infrastructure where reliability, compliance...

items.title: Canal Capital Management adds Akre Focus ETF
items.description: Canal Capital added the Akre Focus ETF to its equity portfolio during the fourth quarter.

items.title: AI Stocks Pressured In Early 2026 Test. Lumentum, Ciena Jump, Nvidia Edges Down
items.description: Nvidia stock rose Tuesday amid a sell-off in many data center plays as investors mulled capital spending on artificial intelligence.

items.title: Buy Nvidia or AMD Stock After Rolling Out New AI Platforms?
items.description: Their presentations at the 2026 Consumer Electronics Show could lift the appealing outlook for AMD and Nvidia after revealing next-gen AI platforms.
